dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.scanAutoTranslateOn: Auto-translate is on. New jobs from a scan will start translating automatically.
dashboard.scanAutoTranslateOff: Auto-translate is off. Scans will only add jobs to the queue until you run them.
dashboard.selectionHint: Run the selection now or remove it from the queue.
dashboard.noFiles: No subtitle files found. Make sure your media folder is mounted and click Scan Folders.
dashboard.noFilesInMedia: No files found in media folders

toast.scanPreviewComplete: Preview complete: {{total}} subtitles, {{newJobs}} jobs would be added

confirm.clearMessage: This will delete {{count}} jobs. This cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSelectedMessage: This will delete {{count}} pending jobs from the queue. This cannot be undone.
confirm.retranslateVisibleMessage: This will force {{count}} completed or skipped jobs in the current view to run again.
confirm.deleteJobMessage: This will remove this job from the queue. This cannot be undone.

preview.noIssues: No issues found in current filter

dashboard.noJobsHint: Click Scan Folders to discover subtitle files.

quickStart.tasksHint: Add at least one enabled translation target.
quickStart.mediaHint: Run scan to discover subtitle files.
quickStart.title: Setup checklist

dashboard.emptyJobsHint: Try scanning folders, then use the sticky actions to run pending jobs.

scanConfirm.title: Confirm scan and queue

dashboard.emptyScanHint: Try changing scan/search filters or run Scan Folders again.

details.title: Сведения о задании
details.costApprox: Approximate — based on listed model pricing; actual cost may differ.

translation_languages.title: Переводы
translation_languages.subtitle: Each target auto-detects the subtitle source language and writes a translated output file.
translation_languages.noTasksHint: Use the quick-add buttons above or click + Add Translation.
translation_languages.outputFormatHelp: Pick the final subtitle file extension. SubSmelt will generate that subtitle format.
translation_languages.langCodeHelp: Short code for the output filename. Letters and numbers only.
translation_languages.patternHelp: {{name}} = source stem, {{lang_code}} = code above, {{ext}} = original extension
translation_languages.promptOverridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the global prompt. Overrides the system prompt for this translation target only.
translation_languages.promptOverrideHint: Uses {{lang}}, {{source_lang}}, and {{additional}} placeholders, same as the global prompt.
translation_languages.addPromptOverride: + Add custom prompt for this translation

confirm.deleteMessage: Delete "{{lang}}" translation? All associated jobs will also be removed.

translation_languages.formatMismatch: Pattern extension ({{detected}}) does not match selected format ({{selected}}).
translation_languages.sourceAutoHelp: SubSmelt просит модель автоматически определить язык субтитров, поэтому нужно выбрать только язык результата.

settings.title: Settings

interface.title: Интерфейс
interface.description: Выберите, как SubSmelt будет выглядеть в этом браузере.
interface.languageHint: Сохраняется в этом браузере и применяется сразу.
interface.themeHint: Выберите светлый или тёмный интерфейс либо следуйте настройке системы.
interface.fontSizeHint: Scale the entire interface up or down. Saved on this device.

llmConnection.title: LLM Connection
llmConnection.description: Use a local self-hosted LLM, or connect to OpenAI, Anthropic, or Google Gemini.
llmConnection.fetchModelsHint: Click ↻ Fetch models to load available models from your LLM server.
llmConnection.testRefused: ✕ Connection refused — is the LLM server running?
llmConnection.temperatureHelp: Sampling temperature affects the randomness and determinism of text generated by language models. A lower temperature (like 0.2) produces more precise and deterministic text, suitable for formal documents; a higher temperature (like 0.8) makes the text more creative and varied, ideal for creative purposes. Adjusting this parameter properly can tailor the model's output to meet specific usage requirements.
llmConnection.provider_local_hint: Use a self-hosted or OpenAI-compatible endpoint (LM Studio, Ollama, vLLM, GPUStack).
llmConnection.provider_openai_hint: Translate using OpenAI's API. Your API key is stored locally and never sent anywhere except api.openai.com.
llmConnection.provider_anthropic_hint: Translate using Anthropic's Claude API. Your API key is stored locally and sent only to api.anthropic.com.
llmConnection.provider_gemini_hint: Translate using Google Gemini's API. Your API key is stored locally and sent only to generativelanguage.googleapis.com.

translationEngine.title: Translation Engine
translationEngine.description: Controls how subtitle chunks are sent to the LLM.
translationEngine.additionalContextPlaceholder: Character names, glossary, style notes — injected into {{additional}}
translationEngine.chunkSizeHint: Lines per LLM call. 15–25 recommended. Lower = more accurate, higher = faster.
translationEngine.contextWindowHint: Surrounding lines sent for context. 3–7 recommended. More = better coherence, more tokens.
translationEngine.parallelChunksHint: Number of chunks to translate simultaneously (1–8). Higher = faster. Set to 1 to disable.
translationEngine.requestTimeoutHint: Max seconds to wait for a single LLM response. Increase for slow/large thinking models (e.g. 600).
translationEngine.refinePassHint: Runs a second LLM editing pass to make translations read more naturally — better quality, but ~2× the token cost and slower. Falls back to the first-pass translation if the edit fails. Default off.

sources.title: Sources & Monitoring
sources.description: Media folders are mounted into the container. Choose how SubSmelt should scan them.
sources.mediaSourcesIntro: These are the folders mounted into the container. Pick a scan mode below to control which ones are scanned.
sources.scanProfilesHint: Save and reload folder selections for common library slices.
sources.scanRootOnlyDesc: Only files directly in the media root, no subfolders
sources.scanSelectedDesc: Pick specific folders above to scan
sources.summaryRecursive: All {{count}} detected folders will be scanned recursively.
sources.summaryRecursiveWithExclusions: All {{count}} detected folders will be scanned recursively except {{excluded}} excluded folders.
sources.summaryRootOnly: Only files directly in {{path}} will be scanned. Subfolders will be ignored.
sources.summaryCustom: {{selected}} folders are included and {{excluded}} folders are excluded out of {{total}} detected folders.
sources.summaryNoneSelected: Selected mode is active but no folders are checked — nothing will be scanned.
sources.summaryNoneDetected: No mounted folders were detected under {{path}}. Check your Docker volume mounts.
sources.helpBody: Folders on your host (for example /share/Media/Movies) are mounted into the container under {{path}}. Each entry above is one mounted source — for example, /share/Media/Movies on the host appears as {{path}}/movies inside the container.
sources.fileWatcherDesc: Auto-detect new subtitle files and queue translations instantly.
sources.videoExtensionsHint: Comma-separated. Used to match subtitles to videos.
sources.subtitleExtensionsHint: File types to scan for translation.
sources.autoScanIntervalHint: Polling fallback. Set to 0 to disable. Use File Watcher for instant detection.
sources.autoTranslateHint: When on, newly detected subtitles start translating immediately. Turn off to just queue them and run manually with Run All or Run Selected.
sources.translateWithoutVideoHint: Глобальное значение по умолчанию: если включено, файлы субтитров без соответствующего видео переводятся везде. Правила каталогов могут переопределять это для каждой папки.

dirRules.title: Правила каталогов
dirRules.hint: Применяйте разное поведение перевода для каждой папки. Правило распространяется на папку и все её вложенные папки; приоритет имеет наиболее конкретное правило.
dirRules.noRules: Нет правил каталогов. Добавьте правило, чтобы переводить субтитры без видео или добавить языки для определённых папок.

sources.monthlyTokenBudgetHint: Soft monthly cap for the usage indicator. 0 = unlimited. Display-only — never blocks translation.

notifications.title: Notifications
notifications.hint: Fire an outbound webhook when jobs complete or fail and when the queue finishes. Leave the URL empty to disable. Events is a comma-separated list (job:done, job:error, queue:finished, queue:stopped).

settings.unsavedBanner: You have unsaved changes. Save when you're ready.

transcription.title: Speech-to-text
transcription.description: Connect SubSmelt to an optional faster-whisper-compatible backend for local subtitle generation.
transcription.enableHelp: Translates existing subtitles without this; enable only when you have a transcription backend configured.
transcription.backendUrlHelp: Use http://whisper-backend:8001 for the optional compose backend, or point to your own local faster-whisper server.
transcription.backendTokenHelp: Optional shared secret for a remote backend. Leave blank for a localhost backend. When set, it is sent as an Authorization header on every transcription request and must match the backend's SUBSMELT_WHISPER_TOKEN.
transcription.pathMapFromHelp: Optional. Leave both mapping fields blank for the default same-path setup.
transcription.pathMapToHelp: When set, SubSmelt validates the local path under MEDIA_DIR first, then sends the rewritten absolute path to the backend.
transcription.pathMapExample: Example: if SubSmelt sees {{source}} but your external backend mounts the same files at {{target}}, set from={{from}} and to={{to}}.
transcription.modelDistilLargeV3: Distil Large v3 — near-large, much faster
transcription.deviceHelp: CPU is the safe default. External backends may support cuda.
transcription.maxLineLengthHelp: Wrap subtitle text at roughly this many characters per line.
transcription.maxSubtitleDurationHelp: Passed to the backend for future segment polishing; kept lightweight in core.
transcription.mergeShortSegmentsHelp: Stored and sent to the backend, but kept conservative unless the backend can merge safely.
transcription.folderDefaultsHelp: JSON array. Longest matching folder wins. Supported keys: path, model, language, output_format, device, compute_type, use_vad, max_line_length, max_subtitle_duration, merge_short_segments, advanced_options.
transcription.advancedOptionsHelp: Lightweight faster-whisper options are passed through. Speaker diarization and background-music separation are opt-in backend capabilities; this backend reports them clearly if unavailable instead of pulling heavy dependencies into core.

readiness.title: Transcription readiness
readiness.disabledSummary: Speech-to-text is disabled. SubSmelt will continue translating existing subtitles without a Whisper backend.
readiness.needsBackendSummary: Add a backend URL to enable local transcription readiness checks. Whisper is optional and not required by the main app.
readiness.readySummary: Ready to transcribe with the configured optional backend.
readiness.unreachableSummary: Backend is configured but not reachable yet. Check that the optional whisper service is running and the URL is saved.
readiness.saveBeforeRefresh: Save settings before refreshing readiness so the backend health check uses the latest URL/options.
readiness.ramRecommended: RAM meets the CPU recommendation for this model.
readiness.ramMinimumOnly: RAM meets the minimum but is below the recommendation; expect slower or less reliable runs.
readiness.ramBelowMinimum: RAM is below the minimum for {{model}}.{{suggestedModel, string}}
readiness.ramDetailsPending: RAM details will appear when the backend reports health.
readiness.modelNotAdvertised: Selected model is not advertised by this backend.
readiness.outputNotAdvertised: Selected output format is not advertised by this backend.
readiness.firstRunDownload: First run may spend extra time downloading model weights before transcription starts.
readiness.cachePending: Cache details will appear when the backend reports health for the selected model.
readiness.firstRunQuiet: First transcription runs can stay quiet for a while while the model downloads or warms up.

transcription.transportHelp: How media reaches the backend. Auto: upload when a backend token is set with no path map (true remote), otherwise shared path. Shared: the backend reads the same files (local or path-mapped). Upload: SubSmelt sends the media and writes the returned subtitle locally — no shared storage needed.

connections.modeHelpFallback: Пробовать подключения по очереди — если одно не сработает, перейти к следующему.
connections.modeHelpParallel: Распределять фрагменты задания между подключениями для ускорения перевода.

settings.rawConfigHint: JSON blobs for per-folder STT defaults and advanced options.
settings.invalidJson: {{field}} must be valid JSON. Fix it before saving.

models.title: Whisper Models
models.description: Download or remove Whisper models on the transcription backend. Downloads stream live progress.
models.needsBackend: Set a transcription backend URL above to manage models.
models.deleteConfirm: Delete the {{model}} model from the backend cache? It can be re-downloaded later.

logs.title: Logs
logs.noLogs: No log entries yet. Activity will appear here as you use the app.

confirm.clearMessage: This will permanently delete all log entries. This cannot be undone.

logs.noLogsForJob: No logs for this job yet.

app.queueSectionSubtitle: Filter and run subtitle translation jobs by status, folder, and target.
app.scanGroupedHint: Grouped for easier reading after large scans.
app.scanPreviewHint: Dry run only. Review what would be added before creating jobs.
app.scanNoMatch: No scan entries match this view.
app.scanSelectPending: Select pending jobs for this scanned file

transcription.transcribing: Transcribing audio… This can take a while on first model download.
transcription.enableHint: Enable speech-to-text in Settings to generate subtitles from this video.

errors.loadFailed: Something went wrong while loading this data.
errors.boundaryMessage: An unexpected error occurred while rendering this page.

convert.title: Subtitle Converter
convert.description: Convert subtitle files between formats (SRT, VTT, ASS, SSA) right in your browser. No translation — pure format conversion. Drop one or many files, pick a target format, and download.
convert.emptyHint: Add subtitle files to get started.
convert.errors: Some files could not be converted
convert.allFailed: None of the files could be converted. Check the errors below.
convert.unsupported: Skipped {{count}} unsupported file(s). Only .srt, .vtt, .ass, .ssa are accepted.
convert.fileTooLarge: File is too large (max 10MB per file).

whisper.title: Whisper — Speech to Text
whisper.subtitle: Backend readiness, model downloads, and recent transcriptions. Select videos to transcribe on the Dashboard.
whisper.pickerHint: Select single files, multiple files, or whole folders, choose a format, then transcribe.
whisper.noVideos: No video files found under the media directory.
whisper.overwriteHint: Transcribing a file that already has a subtitle of the same name overwrites it.
whisper.overwriteConfirm: {{count}} selected file(s) already have a subtitle. Transcribing will overwrite the same-named output. Continue?
